questions.question: Which DSA concept best matches: sequential search scanning each element until target found?
questions.explanation: Linear Search is defined as: sequential search scanning each element until target found.

questions.question: What is the most accurate description of 'Linear Search'?
options: sequential search scanning each element until target found
non-comparison sort for bounded integer ranges
all-pairs shortest path dynamic programming algorithm
search technique trying possibilities and undoing invalid choices
questions.explanation: Linear Search refers to: sequential search scanning each element until target found.

questions.question: 'Linear Search' belongs mainly to which DSA area?
questions.explanation: Linear Search is mainly part of Sorting and Searching.

questions.question: A Bank SO IT technical requirement states: sequential search scanning each element until target found. Which concept should be selected?
questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to Linear Search.

questions.question: Which DSA concept best matches: search estimating likely position in uniformly distributed sorted data?
questions.explanation: Interpolation Search is defined as: search estimating likely position in uniformly distributed sorted data.

questions.question: What is the most accurate description of 'Interpolation Search'?
options: graph traversal exploring neighbors level by level
search estimating likely position in uniformly distributed sorted data
class of decision problems verifiable in polynomial time and NP-hard
sorting algorithm repeatedly swapping adjacent out-of-order elements
questions.explanation: Interpolation Search refers to: search estimating likely position in uniformly distributed sorted data.

questions.question: 'Interpolation Search' belongs mainly to which DSA area?
questions.explanation: Interpolation Search is mainly part of Sorting and Searching.

questions.question: A Bank SO IT technical requirement states: search estimating likely position in uniformly distributed sorted data. Which concept should be selected?
questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to Interpolation Search.
